form.formComment: Last start held ground to the line 3rd of 8 at Hawera on March 25 over 1400m, 3 len behind What Next carrying 57.5kg at $5.80. The race before that struggled in the run home; 6th of 12 at Tauherenikau on March 5 over 1600m, slow going 7 len behind Shoebill carrying 57.5kg at $2.60. Should hold the form and he appeals as one of the hardest to beat.
